name: King Ranch Spanish Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a heavy Dutch oven.
2. Add rice and the next seven ingredients; cook until rice is browned, stirring often.
3. Stir in water and tomato sauce; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium; cover and cook 25 minutes or until rice is tender.
5. Yield: 8 to 10 servings.
